Contact Us

Life at Longhorn Heights means

Bringing neighbors together through shared spaces, events, and community spirit.

Welcome to Longhorn Heights

Longhorn Heights is a vibrant community nestled in the heart of Austin, Texas. Our mission is to foster a sense of belonging and connection among residents through shared spaces, events, and community spirit.

With tree-lined streets, well-maintained homes, and access to top-notch amenities like our private pool, walking trails, and community clubhouse, Longhorn Heights offers the perfect blend of comfort, convenience, and charm.

Resort-Style Amenities

Enjoy access to our clubhouse, private pool, and beautifully maintained green spaces.

Community Events

From holiday gatherings to outdoor movie nights, there's always something happening.

Playgrounds & Family Areas

Safe and well-equipped play zones for children and shaded seating for families.

Beautiful Homes
Strong Community
Safe & Secure
Green Spaces
Modern Clubhouse
Sports Courts
Why Longhorn Heights Stands Out
Safe & Secure

Our gated community provides 24/7 security patrols and surveillance for peace of mind.

Read more
Green Spaces

Enjoy beautifully maintained parks, trails, and clean areas throughout the neighborhood.

Read more
Strong Community

Connect with neighbors through community events, meetings, and social programs.

Read more
Prime Location

Located in North Austin with easy access to schools, shops, and also tech corridors.

Ready to Get Involved?

Whether you want to join a committee, volunteer for an event, or attend the next board meeting, we welcome your participation.

Stay Connected
